Dialog interfaces and structures for Pebble firmware, including actionable, Bluetooth, confirmation, expandable, and simple dialogs.


## Files
- **[actionable_dialog.c](actionable_dialog.c.md)**: Implements an actionable dialog interface for Pebble firmware, including icon and action bar management.
- **[actionable_dialog.h](actionable_dialog.h.md)**: Functions for creating, initializing, and managing ActionableDialog objects in a UI framework.
- **[actionable_dialog_private.h](actionable_dialog_private.h.md)**: Defines the ActionableDialog structure with customizable action bars and click configurations.
- **[bt_conn_dialog.c](bt_conn_dialog.c.md)**: Implements a Bluetooth connection dialog for handling communication session events and user notifications.
- **[bt_conn_dialog.h](bt_conn_dialog.h.md)**: Defines a Bluetooth connection dialog using a SimpleDialog wrapper with event handling capabilities.
- **[confirmation_dialog.c](confirmation_dialog.c.md)**: Implements a confirmation dialog with action bar and icon management for Pebble firmware.
- **[confirmation_dialog.h](confirmation_dialog.h.md)**: Defines a ConfirmationDialog wrapper for ActionableDialog with creation, retrieval, and stack operations.
- **[dialog.c](dialog.c.md)**: Functions for configuring and displaying dialog windows, including text, icons, and animations.
- **[dialog.h](dialog.h.md)**: Defines the Dialog structure and functions for managing dialog windows, including text, icons, and animations.
- **[dialog_private.c](dialog_private.c.md)**: Functions for initializing, displaying, and managing dialog windows in the Pebble firmware.
- **[dialog_private.h](dialog_private.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, managing, and displaying dialog components in a UI framework.
- **[expandable_dialog.c](expandable_dialog.c.md)**: Implements an expandable dialog interface with scrolling and action bar functionality for Pebble firmware.
- **[expandable_dialog.h](expandable_dialog.h.md)**: Defines the ExpandableDialog structure and functions for creating, configuring, and managing expandable dialogs with scrollable text and action bars.
- **[simple_dialog.c](simple_dialog.c.md)**: Implements a simple dialog interface for the Pebble firmware, including layout and interaction logic.
- **[simple_dialog.h](simple_dialog.h.md)**: Defines the SimpleDialog structure and functions for creating, initializing, and managing simple dialogs.
